name: ContributorProfile
description: Cross-campaign profile for an organization or individual that contributes to relief efforts.

modules.name: profile
modules.description: Profile metadata, wallet registry, and governance endpoints

operations.name: SET_PROFILE_DETAILS
operations.schema:
input SetProfileDetailsInput {
    legalName: String
    displayName: String
    kind: ContributorKind
    websiteUrl: URL
    twitterHandle: String
    farcasterHandle: String
}

operations.name: ADD_WALLET
operations.description: Register an on-chain wallet for this contributor
operations.template: Register an on-chain wallet for this contributor

errors.name: DuplicateWalletError
errors.description: A wallet with the same address and chain id is already registered

operations.name: REMOVE_WALLET

errors.name: WalletNotFoundError
errors.description: No wallet with the supplied id is registered

operations.name: ADD_GOVERNANCE_ENDPOINT
operations.description: Register a governance endpoint URL for this contributor
operations.template: Register a governance endpoint URL for this contributor

errors.name: DuplicateGovernanceEndpointError
errors.description: A governance endpoint with the same platform and URL is already registered

operations.name: REMOVE_GOVERNANCE_ENDPOINT

errors.name: GovernanceEndpointNotFoundError
errors.description: No governance endpoint with the supplied id is registered

operations.name: SET_TRUST_LEVEL
operations.description: Set the trust level (VERIFIED / ANNOUNCED / ANONYMOUS)
operations.template: Set the trust level (VERIFIED / ANNOUNCED / ANONYMOUS)
